selection.title: Choose Your Interviewer
selection.subtitle: Select a role to start your mock DevOps interview

recruiter.description: Soft skills, motivation and basic technical knowledge
recruiter.greeting: Hi, I'm {{name}}, the Recruiter for this role. I'll ask about your motivation, soft skills, and some basic technical fundamentals.

hr.greeting: Hello, I'm {{name}}, the HR Manager. Let's talk about culture fit and how you work with a team.

senior-devops.description: CI/CD, Kubernetes, IaC, incidents and observability
senior-devops.greeting: Hey, I'm {{name}}, Senior DevOps Engineer. I'll dive into some deep technical questions on Kubernetes, CI/CD, Terraform, and AWS.

cto.greeting: Hi, I'm {{name}}, CTO / Tech Lead. I'd like to discuss architecture, scalability, and security trade-offs with you.

meet.finished: The interview is over. Thank you for your answers!

assessment.title: {{role}} — session summary
assessment.disclaimer: Mock rubric, not a real skill grade — full LLM-based answer grading arrives with on-device inference (DIA-84).

controls.micUnsupported: Voice input is not supported in this browser
controls.notAvailable: Not available in this mock interview
